CustomField.description: Calculates the attendance percentage by considering attended, absent and excused sessions.
CustomField.formula: (Total_Attended__c + Total_Excused__c) / IF((Total_Attended__c + Total_Excused__c + Total_Absent__c) > 0, (Total_Attended__c + Total_Excused__c + Total_Absent__c), 1)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculates the attendance percentage by considering attended, absent and excused sessions.
CustomField.label: Attendance %
